title: Thriden upgrade payload manifest (Phase 1)
description: Manifest consumed by bin/thriden-deploy-payload.sh. Phase 1 is file-based; Phase 3 will reuse this shape as the input half of the Mongo deploy_payloads document. See docs/design-upgrade-at-wake.md.

thriden_version.description: Human-meaningful label for this bundle. Not load-bearing — appears in logs and the result file.

components.description: Map of logical component name to image tag. Logical names map to compose env vars (engram → ENGRAM_VERSION, forge → FORGE_VERSION, nooscope → NOOSCOPE_VERSION) which are interpolated into image: refs in compose.prod.yml.

additionalProperties.description: Image tag (e.g. 'main', 'main-abc123', 'v1.5.0'). Must exist in GHCR for the component's image. Constrained to GHCR-legal tag chars (alphanumeric + . _ -) so the wrapper's `sops set` call can't be tricked into emitting malformed JSON by a tag containing quotes or shell metacharacters.

ordering.description: Order in which to swap + smoke-test components. Rollback runs in reverse. Must include exactly the keys present in 'components'.

smoke_tier_overrides.description: Override default smoke-test tier per component. Default: tier 1 (liveness + healthcheck) for engram/forge/nooscope. Tier 0 = liveness only (no HTTP probe). Tier 2 = liveness + healthcheck + canary query — engram only, Phase 2 dependency (requires /admin/canary endpoint).
